title: Conophytum viridicatum
taxonomy: Conophytum viridicatum is classified as a species of succulent plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is a member of the genus Conophytum, which is commonly known as the button plants. The Aizoaceae family is a group of flowering plants native to southern Africa. Conophytum viridicatum is native to the southern part of Africa, where it grows in well-drained soil. The species is part of the larger group of succulents, which are known for their ability to store water in their leaves.
